title: Spectrum Study Compiler Manifest
description: Schema for SYS-004 compiler manifests capturing inputs, passes, ordering, diagnostics, and reproducibility placeholders.

schema_version.description: Version of the compiler manifest schema.

manifest_id.description: Stable identifier for the compiler manifest.

source_revision.description: Upstream document or artifact revision compiled.

resolved_revision.description: Revision the compiler resolved against after validation.

bundle_ref.description: Identifier for the incoming artifact bundle.

assumption_registry_ref.description: Reference to the assumption registry snapshot used.

run_manifest_ref.description: Reference to the run manifest supporting provenance.

dependency_refs.description: Additional dependency identifiers required for compilation.

inputs.description: Input references that feed the compiler.

bundle_ref.description: Identifier for the emitted artifact bundle.

export_package_ref.description: Path or URI for the packaged export emitted by SYS-004.

outputs.description: Output bundle and package references produced by the compiler.

passes.description: Deterministically ordered compiler passes with outcomes.

version.description: Version or hash of the pass definition.

started_at.description: Start time of the pass execution (UTC).

completed_at.description: Completion time of the pass execution (UTC).

warnings.description: Warning identifiers raised by this pass.

errors.description: Error identifiers raised by this pass.

sort_rule.description: Deterministic ordering rule applied to artifacts (e.g., section, then ordering_key).

artifact_order.description: Final ordered list of artifacts emitted.

reject_on_ties.description: Whether the compiler fails when ordering keys collide.

ordering.description: Recorded ordering rules to guarantee deterministic output.

diagnostics_ref.description: Identifier referencing the diagnostics record for this run.

provenance_ref.description: Provenance record referencing the manifest creation.

input_bundle_checksum.description: Checksum placeholder for the input bundle.

output_bundle_checksum.description: Checksum placeholder for the compiled output bundle.

export_package_checksum.description: Checksum placeholder for the packaged export.

hash_placeholders.description: Future implementation slots for deterministic verification hashes.

updated_at.description: Last update timestamp for the manifest (UTC).
